mechanism: One moral vocabulary is treated as universal
possible_dampener: Measurement validation local knowledge and construct humility

mechanism: Variation is mistaken for total incomparability
possible_dampener: Shared-capacity models and careful pluralist analysis

mechanism: Narrow populations are mistaken for humanity
possible_dampener: Diverse samples and non-WEIRD research designs

mechanism: Key moral terms are treated as equivalent across languages
possible_dampener: Back-translation local collaborators and linguistic analysis

mechanism: A measure does not capture the same concept across contexts
possible_dampener: Measurement invariance tests and qualitative validation

mechanism: Cultures are ranked through imperial or racial assumptions
All local norms are treated as immune from critique
possible_dampener: Contextual moral judgment attentive to harm dignity and power

mechanism: Whole societies are treated as internally uniform
possible_dampener: Internal diversity dissent minority voices and institutional variation
